title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - April 23, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-04-25_2024423wet-dphxd_img_tankerreporttop_3143ac36196b.png
· VLCC Rates Continue to Soften Amid Subdued Activity and a Cautious Charterer Stance - With May fixing activity in full force, the VLCC freight market continued its descent, a trend evident across both the Atlantic and Pacific regions. Such decline unfolded against a backdrop of subdued activity, mirroring the prevailing market sentiment. In the Middle East Gulf, an area of significant VLCC activity, the market found itself in a transitional phase between April and May cargo dates, as charterers adopted a cautious stance with the purpose of applying pressure to rates.
